result.stdout:
Description:
  Run variable substitution in Json files.

Usage:
  Kros.VariableSubstitution [options]

Options:
  -w, --workingDirectory <workingDirectory>            Working directory - required
  -f, --zipFilesOrDirectories <zipFilesOrDirectories>  Glob pattern to search a list of files or directories [default: **/*.zip]
  -j, --jsonTargetFiles <jsonTargetFiles>              Glob pattern to search the target Json files to replace [default: **/*.json]
  -t, --tempDirectory <tempDirectory>                  Path to temp directory [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-krosva-de1bfe7a-cf3c8913/tmp/]
  -v, --variables <variables>                          Variables. (var1=value1 var2=value2). Used for testing.
  --version                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information
